name: aws-commands
label: AWS Commands
description: AWS Commands are used to run AWS native commands for AWS resources configurations directly from FortiSOAR.

name: aws
label: AWS EC2
description: Amazon Elastic Compute Cloud (Amazon EC2) provides scalable computing capacity in the Amazon Web Services (AWS) cloud. You can use Amazon EC2 to launch as many or as few virtual servers as you need, configure security and networking, and manage storage.

name: fortinet-forticasb
label: Fortinet FortiCASB
description: FortiCASB Top Cloud Access Security Broker designed to provide visibility, compliance, data security, and threat protection for cloud-based services being used by an organization
